summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pavan & Satyam portfolio website. All core features working perfectly including 3D animations, navigation, project interactions, and smooth scroll.

design_issues.impact: Minor console warning, no visual impact

passed_tests: Hero section loads with 3D wireframe geometry (Three.js canvas)
Project panels show details when expanded
Footer CTA and email links are clickable
Contact section email and LinkedIn links functional
All data-testid attributes present for testing
